---
title: "Quiz"
format: html

previous:
  href: "Creator-Ethics of Reuse.html"
  text: "Ethics of Reuse"

next:
  href: "../Modular OERs/Modular-learning outcomes.html"
  text: "Advanced: Modular OERs Using R and Quarto"
---

<form id="quiz">

<!-- Q1 -->

<p>

<strong>1) Which of the following is the most appropriate use of alternative text (alt text) for an educational image?</strong><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="A" data-correct="true"> A) A short explanation conveying the image’s purpose or meaning in context </label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="B"> B) A word for word description of every visual detail in the image</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="C"> C) Leaving the alt text blank for all decorative and nondecorative images</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="D"> D) A long paragraph describing the image, even if the image is purely decorative`</la`{=html}

<!-- Q2 -->

<p><strong>2) Which file format choice is most appropriate for ensuring an Open Educational Resource (OER) is accessible to the widest range of users?</strong><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="A"> A) Providing only a PDF version of the resource, as PDFs are universally accessible</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="B" data-correct="true"> B) Sharing materials in open, editable formats (e.g., HTML or DOCX) alongside a tagged, accessible PDF</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="C"> C) Using image only PDFs because they display consistently on all devices</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="D"> D) Sharing resources only in proprietary formats because they preserve design features</label></p>

<!-- Q3 -->

<p><strong>3) Which of the following is an example of a non proprietary file format commonly recommended for sharing Open Educational Resources (OERs)?</strong><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q3" value="A"> A) .docx</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q3" value="B"> B) .pptx</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q3" value="C" data-correct="true"> C) .qmd</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q3" value="D"> D) .psd</label></p>

<!-- Q4 -->

<p><strong>4) Which of the following is the most important ethical consideration when *repurposing* an Open Educational Resource (OER)?</strong><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q4" value="A"> A) Ensuring the adapted resource looks completely different from the original</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q4" value="B" data-correct="true"> B) Making sure the original creator is properly credited and the context of their work is respected</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q4" value="C"> C) Avoiding the use of images, even if they are openly licensed</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q4" value="D"> D) Releasing the adapted version only to your own institution</label></p>

<!-- Hyperlinked controls -->

<p><a href="#" id="submit-link">✔️ Submit</a>  </p>

</form>

<!-- Result area -->

::: {#result style="font-weight: bold; margin-top: 1em;"}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.getElementById("submit-link").addEventListener("click", function (e) {
  e.preventDefault();

  const form = document.getElementById("quiz");
  const correct = form.querySelectorAll('input[data-correct="true"]:checked').length;
  const total = 4;

  const result = document.getElementById("result");
  const indexLink = document.getElementById("index-link");
  const backLink = document.getElementById("back-link");

  let message = `You scored ${correct}/${total}. `;

  if (correct >= 2) {
    message += "Well done!";
    indexLink.style.display = "block";
    backLink.style.display = "none";
  } else {
    message += "You might want to go back and look at sections of the Introduction to OERs unit.";
    indexLink.style.display = "none";
    backLink.style.display = "block";
  }

  result.textContent = message;
});
</script>
```

::: {#index-link style="display: none; margin-top: 1.5em; text-align: center;"}
<a href="/index.html"> <img src="images/clipboard-3722003544.png" alt="Return to programme home page" width="50"/> </a>
:::

::: {#back-link style="display: none; margin-top: 1.5em; text-align: center;"}
<a href="/OERs for creators/Creator-learning outcomes.html"> <img src="images/clipboard-372805318.png" alt="Return to the beginning of the unit" width="50"/> </a>
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
